description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a weathered, rusty red exterior, showing significant signs of age and use. The body is made of metal and features a single, robust handle welded to the side for carrying. At the top, there is a black, round valve knob and a short metal stem, but no visible hose or nozzle. The surface is mottled with patches of rust and grime, and there is a white label with Cyrillic text and pictograms partially visible on one side. The base is flat, allowing the extinguisher to stand upright, and the overall form is utilitarian and industrial, typical for older fire safety equipment. This object would be commonly found in garages, workshops, or industrial urban environments.
description: A tall, cylindrical, rusted red metal fire extinguisher with a side handle, black valve knob, and a partially visible white label.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cylindrical body, the side handle, and the top valve knob, with rust and grime visible across the surface.
description_view_1: This view highlights the handle and the white label with Cyrillic text, as well as more extensive rust patches on the body.
description_view_2: The handle is fully visible on the left, with the valve knob on top and a heavily rusted, worn surface.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the plain, rusted back of the extinguisher with no handle or label visible, only the top valve knob.
attribute_label_or_signage: White rectangular label with Cyrillic text and pictograms, located on the lower side of the cylinder near the handle.
